task: What are the Nearby Attractions from the most popular attraction in Hong Kong?
final_result_response:
Starting from https://us.trip.com/, I navigated to the Hong Kong attractions search and found that **Hong Kong Disneyland** is the most popular attraction in Hong Kong (84,696 reviews — far more than any other).

Here are the **Nearby Attractions** listed on Hong Kong Disneyland's page (https://us.trip.com/travel-guide/attraction/hong-kong/hong-kong-disneyland-10558849/):

1. **Inspiration Lake Recreation Centre** — Parks | ⭐ 4.5/5 | 227 reviews | 0.8 km away
2. **Noah's Ark Hong Kong** — Theme Parks | ⭐ 4.4/5 | 1,288 reviews | 6.1 km away
3. **Ngong Ping 360** — Nature & Sightseeing | ⭐ 4.7/5 | 12,024 reviews | 11.5 km away
4. **Sky100 Observation Deck** — Nature & Sightseeing | ⭐ 4.6/5 | 4,370 reviews | 11.6 km away
5. **The Peak Tram** — Nature & Sightseeing | ⭐ 4.6/5 | 7,166 reviews | 13.5 km away
